title: Mumbai Heat Wave
lead: Mumbai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.57. The city's temperature is significantly higher than usual.
body:
The current heat wave in Mumbai has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The city's Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 15.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 51% and the wind speed is at 14.9 km/h, making the heat feel more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
